by_failure_reason.label: Out of Stock
by_failure_reason.desc: Seller's available inventory was below buyer's needs even for partial.
by_failure_reason.fix: Real-time ERP/Tally stock sync; pre-order flag for high-demand SKUs.

by_failure_reason.label: BATNA Walk-Away
by_failure_reason.desc: Buyer walked away — counter was >5% worse than their best known alternative.
by_failure_reason.fix: Improve BATNA seeding with real-time category price benchmarks.

by_failure_reason.label: Price Too High
by_failure_reason.desc: Seller's floor price exceeds buyer's maximum budget — no ZOPA exists.
by_failure_reason.fix: Show Grade-B alternatives for aftermarket buyers; surface cost breakdown.

oem_tier1.desc: OEM Tier-1 — IATF certified, tight specs, advance-50 payment

tier2_assembler.desc: Tier-2 Assembler — net-30/60, moderate quality, high volume

aftermarket.desc: Aftermarket Distributor — price-sensitive, Grade-B ok, cash-preferred

fleet_buyer.desc: Fleet Buyer — Grade-A quality, willing to pay premium, urgent delivery
